summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of L'ÉTOILE restaurant homepage. All features working perfectly including hero section, navigation, sections content, contact form, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Hero section loads with full viewport height and hero image
Navigation menu works - all links scroll to correct sections (MEIST, TEENUSED, MENÜÜ, GALERII, KONTAKT)
About section displays correctly with image and chef info (Jean-Pierre Dubois)
Services section shows 3 service cards as expected
Menu section displays 4 starters (Eelroad) and 4 main courses (Pearoad) with EUR prices
Gallery section displays 4 images in grid layout
Contact form has all required fields (name, email, phone, date, guests, message)
Contact form submit shows Estonian toast notification and clears form
Mobile navigation toggle button works perfectly
Logo L'ÉTOILE displayed with correct gold color (#D4AF37)
All CTA buttons (Broneeri Laud, Reserveeri Laud) are clickable
Elegant dark theme with gold accents as requested
